title: Garlicky Ukrainian Garlic Borscht Air-Fry
description: A garlicky twist on the traditional Ukrainian borscht, air-fried for a crispy glassy-jelly finish, perfect for a sick-day comfort food.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the beets, onion, and garlic, and toss with 1 tsp of olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the beet mixture to the air fryer basket and cook for 10 minutes, shaking halfway through.
In a separate pan, heat the balsamic vinegar over low heat until reduced by half, stirring occasionally.
In the air fryer basket, add the tomatoes and chilli flakes, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in the reduced balsamic vinegar and cook for 1 minute.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Transfer the borscht to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze for later use, if desired.
